description: Before an upcoming product launch, you must set up the legally required Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages on the corporate WordPress site for Horizon Digital Media. Create and publish a substantive 'Privacy Policy' page including the company name, contact email (privacy@horizondm.com), and mailing address (742 Innovation Drive, San Francisco, CA 94105). This page must be officially designated as the site's Privacy Policy in the system settings. Additionally, create and publish a substantive 'Terms of Service' page of at least 300 characters that includes the company name, a section referencing Limitation of Liability, and specifies the State of California as the jurisdiction.
